headline: Salesforce Data Breach And AI Layoffs Reshape Risk And Valuation Narrative
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) reported a customer data breach linked to a connected third party app, Drift, affecting thousands of customer records. The incident has raised fresh questions about how sensitive client data is handled on Salesforce's broader platform. Management also disclosed internal plans to lay off about 4,000 customer support workers as AI tools take over more service tasks. Both developments point to meaningful operational and reputational shifts that extend beyond past...

headline: Why Salesforce (CRM) Is Betting on AI to Drive Its Next Growth Phase
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the undervalued large cap stocks to buy. On April 1, Evercore ISI analyst Kirk Materne reiterated an Outperform rating and $260 price target on Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM). The decision came after Salesforce’s Slackbot event, which Materne said reinforced his conviction in Salesforce’s long-term positioning in what he calls the […]

headline: 'Stop hiring humans'? Silicon Valley confronts AI job panic
summary: AI industry insiders want workers to code smarter, think harder and lean into their humanity -- but still dodge the question of how many jobs artificial intelligence will destroy.In his view, coding is not an obsolete skill -- AI has simply made it available to more people.
